name: Matsuge
description:
__Height:__ 190 cm (6'3")
__Affiliations:__ Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops, Straw Hat Pirates (temporary)
__Origin:__ Alabasta Kingdom (Grand Line)

Matsuge is a camel who accompanied the Straw Hat Pirates during the Alabasta Arc. 
He is classified as a Type-A creature, "Big Friendly".
Matsuge has noticeable eyelashes on the bottom of his eyes, which he is named after.
Matsuge seems to like women as he only allowed [Nami](https://anilist.co/character/723/Nami) and [Vivi](https://anilist.co/character/726/Vivi-Nefertari) to ride him.
